title: Silver Pegasus units to begin separate trading on Nasdaq
content:
* Silver Pegasus Acquisition (NASDAQ:SPEG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SPEG]) announced that unit holders can begin separate trading of shares and rights starting September 8, 2025.
 	* The company completed its IPO on July 16, 2025.
 	* Class A ordinary shares will trade under the symbol “SPEG”, and rights under “SPEGR”.
 	* Unseparated units will continue trading under the symbol “SPEGU”.
 	* Source: Press release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20222684-silver-pegasus-acquisition-corp-announces-the-separate-trading-of-its-class-a-ordinary-shares]
